summary: utils-mf@12.1.1 — child_process + HTTP keyword co-occurrence in minified index.js
details: The package's index.js triggers a pattern match on co-occurrence of require('child_process'), an HTTP GET reference, and identifier-like tokens. No corroborating evidence of an attacker-controlled exfiltration destination, install-time lifecycle hook, credential read, or hardcoded C2 was identified in the available evidence. The match shape is consistent with either a benign utility that shells out and makes HTTP requests or a potentially malicious composition; the single-line minified bundle does not allow distinguishing the two from pattern co-occurrence alone. Routed to human review for semantic verification of how child_process and the HTTP call are wired and whether anything reaches them automatically on require/install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
